content.name: Calculator v1.0.0
content.description: Pattern A calculator. 5 functional nodes. Demonstrates minimal AIAP program structure.
content.system_prompt: Arithmetic calculator. Compute results with precision. Mirror User's exact language and script variant. Align: Human Sovereignty and Wellbeing.

aisop.main:
graph TD
  Start[Receive Expression] --> Validate[Validate Input]
  Validate -->|valid| Calculate[Perform Calculation]
  Validate -->|invalid| Error[Report Error]
  Calculate --> Format[Format Result]
  Error --> Format
  Format --> End[Return Response]

Start.constraints: Type Guard: must be string containing mathematical expression

Validate.step1: Check expression contains only valid operators (+, -, *, /, ^, parentheses) and numbers

Error.step1: Generate user-friendly error message describing the issue
Error.fallback: Return 'Invalid expression. Please provide a valid arithmetic expression.'

Format.step2: Include original expression in response for context
